title: Culinary Craft
description: The mod adds many new dishes such as tomatoes, lettuce, cheese, tea, corn and also various spices such as salt, flour or sweetener.
body: The mod adds many new dishes such as tomatoes, lettuce, cheese, tea, corn and also various spices such as salt, flour or sweetener. For now, this is a beta version of the project and I don't know if it will work. For now, it doesn't look very appealing, but if you like it, I promise to improve it. Here is our discord - https://discord.gg/xbN7FQcd9e
